paragraph_00: This document contains confidential financial data for Q4 2026 Do not distribute externally
paragraph_01: The audit draft includes supplier pricing assumptions and margin forecasts for internal review only
paragraph_02: Screen privacy must be evaluated against snapshot streaming and continuous reconstruction attacks
paragraph_03: A stronger attacker may search the phase of the display cycle before running OCR on recovered frames
paragraph_04: The prototype validates algorithms but production use still requires GPU compositor integration

zh_paragraph_00: 第三章 核心算法 时间分片掩模将每帧拆分 人眼积分后还原完整图像
zh_paragraph_01: 项目评审材料 包含预算安排和人员名单 请勿通过摄像设备传播
zh_paragraph_02: 实验结果显示 单子帧难以被 OCR 识别 完整周期平均仍可还原
zh_paragraph_03: 系统采用随机点阵掩模 并结合互补对抗噪声 提升单帧防护鲁棒性
zh_paragraph_04: 后续工作需要补充 真实手机拍摄与人因实验 以支撑期刊投稿
